overall_explanation: The P0 implementation is well-structured and follows the spec exactly. All three hard rules from the Claude audit are preserved: `/guestbook` and `/llms` use `hover` (never `viewport`), and `/dotfiles/*` file links use `false`. The `getPrefetchStrategy` helper correctly handles external URLs (returns `'false'`), the five heavy-static routes (`/shelf`, `/heatmap`, `/builds`, `/topics`, `/uses`, which are prerendered/CDN-cached) get `viewport`, the two SSR/data routes get `hover`, and all other internal routes fall through to `undefined` (Astro default hover). The `nav-pending.ts` implementation is correct: the 120 ms show-delay prevents flashing on fast/warm swaps, `clearTimers()` is called before re-arming in `markPending` so rapid navigations don't accumulate timers, both `astro:after-swap` and `astro:page-load` call the idempotent `clearPending`, and the 12 s fallback clears stuck state safely. The `__leohuynhNavPendingBound` guard prevents duplicate event binding across re-initializations. CSS uses `position: absolute` inside a `position: relative` wrapper, `aria-hidden="true"` on the decorative bar, and a correct `prefers-reduced-motion` fallback (static full-width bar instead of animation). No security, correctness, regression, or test-gap issues introduced by this diff.
